meta_title: For Founders: design with AI to Solve no portfolio (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to design with AI and overcome no portfolio. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Design with AI to Solve No Portfolio (Advanced)
content.seo_description: Learn how to design with AI and overcome no portfolio. An advanced-level checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code for rapid SaaS deployment.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap is a business failure, not a design one. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative feature development, you can ship a high-fidelity, production-ready SaaS MVP in days, effectively demonstrating technical authority through live, functional, and revenue-generating software.
content.intro:
You are staring at a blank screen, the silence of your repository echoing the anxiety of a founder with no track record. Potential investors and early adopters don't care about your resume; they care about what you can ship. The 'no portfolio' barrier is a ghost, and it is time to exorcise it with the speed of AI-native engineering.

We are moving beyond hobbyist projects. This is about architectural dominance. By marrying the rapid prototyping capabilities of Antigravity with the autonomous coding power of Claude Code, you will build a sophisticated product that functions as both a service and a testament to your technical execution. Stop talking about your vision and start showing it.

steps.title: Define the High-Value SaaS Schema
steps.description: Don't build a generic landing page. Define a data-driven SaaS schema that solves a specific, painful B2B problem. Use Antigravity to structure the database and API endpoints.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a robust SaaS schema for a [Niche] platform. Include user authentication, subscription tiers, and a core utility feature that handles [Specific Problem]. Ensure the architecture is modular for rapid scaling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'initialize project with the generated schema and setup a secure PostgreSQL connection'

steps.title: Rapid UI Component Scaffolding
steps.description: Speed is your only competitive advantage. Use Antigravity to generate high-conversion, responsive UI components that look like they were built by a senior design team.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a high-fidelity dashboard UI using Tailwind CSS. Include a sidebar navigation, a metric tracking grid, and a data input form. Ensure mobile-first responsiveness and dark mode support.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'integrate these components into the main layout and apply a consistent design system'

steps.title: Autonomous Backend Logic Implementation
steps.description: Move from static designs to functional code. Use Claude Code to write the business logic that transforms user input into actual value.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a service layer function that processes [Core Logic] and handles edge cases for error reporting and user feedback.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement the backend service layer and add robust unit tests for the core logic'

steps.title: Integrate Monetization Infrastructure
steps.description: A portfolio project without a payment gateway is just a sandbox. Integrate Stripe to prove your product is designed for revenue.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a secure Stripe integration flow that supports one-time payments and recurring subscriptions, including webhooks for event handling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'add stripe payment flow, configure environment variables, and create a test checkout route'

steps.title: Automated Deployment and CI/CD
steps.description: Nothing proves your skill like a live URL. Automate your deployment pipeline so every commit is a production-ready update.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow for automated testing and deployment to Vercel/AWS. Include environment protection and build verification.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'setup CI/CD pipeline and verify deployment health checks'

pro_tips: Focus on 'utility-first' design; a ugly, functional app that makes money is worth more than a beautiful app that does nothing.
Use Claude Code to document your code as you write it; documentation is the hallmark of a senior engineer.
Always deploy to a custom domain immediately; it changes the psychological weight of the project from 'experiment' to 'product'.
Integrate observability tools like Sentry or LogSnag early; showing you handle production monitoring signals deep technical maturity.
Build a 'public-facing' version of your internal logic to show transparency; it builds trust with your future customers.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, identify one core metric to track, set up an analytics dashboard, and start your first cold outreach campaign to validate the product with real users.
content.conversion_block: You now have the framework, the tools, and the strategy to build a product that transcends a mere portfolio. It is time to stop waiting for permission and start building your legacy. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
